parameters.jsCode:
return $input.all().map(item => ({
  json: {
    'Test Case ID':    item.json['Test Case ID'],
    'Title':           item.json['Title'],
    'Module':          item.json['Module'],
    'Suite':           item.json['Suite'],
    'Preconditions':   item.json['Preconditions'],
    'Test Steps':      item.json['Test Steps'],
    'Expected Result': item.json['Expected Result'],
    'Test Data':       item.json['Test Data'],
    'Test Type':       item.json['Test Type'],
    'Priority':        item.json['Priority'],
    'Status':          item.json['Status'],
    'Run Date':        '',
    'Actual Result':   '',
    'Execution Status': 'Not Run'
  }
}));

parameters.formDescription: Enter a Jira ticket ID to automatically generate test cases and export to Google Sheets

parameters.text:
=TICKET ID: {{ $json.key || $json.number }}
SUMMARY: {{ $json.summary || $json.title }}
DESCRIPTION: {{ $json.description || $json.body || 'Not provided - infer from summary' }}
PRIORITY: {{ $json.priority?.name || $json.labels?.[0]?.name || 'Medium' }}
ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA: {{ $json['Sub-tasks']?.[0]?.fields?.summary || $json.body || 'Infer from description' }}

DEPTH RULES:
- High: 20 test cases, extensive edge cases and boundary conditions
- Medium: 15 test cases, standard coverage
- Low: 10 test cases, happy path and key negatives
- Unknown priority: default to Medium rules

FEATURE TYPE — auto detect from summary and description:
- UI feature: form validation, navigation, error messages, empty states
- API feature: status codes, payloads, authentication, invalid inputs
- Mobile feature: touch, orientation, offline mode, notifications
- Accessibility: screen reader, keyboard nav, contrast, focus
- Mixed: combine all relevant types

MODULE — infer from summary if not explicitly stated.
If Acceptance Criteria is missing, infer from description 
and note assumptions in preconditions.

Return ONLY a raw JSON array. Nothing before. Nothing after.
Each object must have exactly these fields:
id, title, module, suite, preconditions, steps, 
expected_result, test_data, test_type, priority, status

options.systemMessage:
You are a senior QA engineer with expertise in manual and 
automated testing. You write clear, structured test cases 
for any type of software feature. Never use markdown links. 
Write plain text only. Return only raw JSON with no text 
before or after the array.

owner.value: ={{ $('GitHub info').item.json['GitHub Repository URL'].split('/')[3] || $('GitHub info1').item.json['GitHub Repository URL'].split('/')[3] }}

repository.value: ={{ $('GitHub info').item.json['GitHub Repository URL'].split('/')[4] || $('GitHub info1').item.json['GitHub Repository URL'].split('/')[4] }}

parameters.filePath:
=tests/generated/tc-{{$('Extract Jira Ticket').isExecuted 
  ? $('Extract Jira Ticket').item.json.key 
  : ('GH-' + ($('GitHub info1').isExecuted 
      ? $('GitHub info1').item.json['Issue Number'] 
      : $('GitHub info').item.json['Issue Number']))
}}-{{$('Inject Framework input').item.json['Framework']}}.spec.js

parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{$('GitHub info').item.json['GitHub Repository URL'].split('/')[3]}}/{{$('GitHub info').item.json['GitHub Repository URL'].split('/')[4]}}/contents/tests/generated/tc-GH-{{$('GitHub info').item.json['Issue Number']}}-{{$('Inject Framework input').item.json['Framework']}}.spec.js
